questions.question: List three desirable properties of good features for pattern classification. (3 marks)
keyPoints: Invariant to transformations (e.g., rotation, scale, translation).

questions.question: Explain the training and classification phases of the Minimum Distance Classifier. Use a numerical example with two classes and two features to illustrate your answer. (10 marks)
keyPoints: Definition of Training Phase: Calculating the prototype (mean vector) for each class using labeled data.
Definition of Classification Phase: Calculating distance from unknown pattern to each prototype and assigning to the class with minimum distance.
Numerical Example: Providing sample data points for two classes (e.g., Class A: [1,2], [2,3]; Class B: [6,7], [7,8]).
Calculation: Showing the calculation of the mean vectors for both classes.
Calculation: Showing the Euclidean distance calculation from a new point (e.g., [4,5]) to both prototypes.
Conclusion: Stating the assigned class based on the minimum distance.
